import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_token = false
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i <= n
    mut is_boundary = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        is_boundary = is_ws(b)
      when None
        is_boundary = true
      end
    end
    if is_boundary
      if in_token
        let token = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      if not in_token
        start = i
        in_token = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_one_line()
  let line2 = read_one_line()

  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if x > t
      if first
        out = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
